transcript.content: [GC-D2] 回到编辑器问题。我现在默认编辑器是什么？
Zed。 重跑 `GC-D2` 之后，修复是生效的：
继续之后，第 3 个点也已经基本收住了。 现在状态是：
直接给你一条最短回归命令，方便你以后自己 spot check。
最短 spot check 我建议就这 2 条： ```bash npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent ```
接下来 我要做蛇呢么？

接下来做这 3 件事就够了。 1. 先留一条最小回归命令 直接用这条做以后 spot check： ```bash npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent ``` 如果怀疑 prompt 没及时落盘，再用： ```bash node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format markdown --prompt "[GC-D2] 回到编辑器问题。…
或者补一个 repo 内可重复的 smoke/eval case，把 GC-D2 收进固定回归
已经补进去了。 新回归 case 在： - [evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case

decision.archive_summary: The editor/GC-D2 detour is resolved. Key retained semantics: the minimal spot-check command is `npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent`, and the repo now has a fixed regression/live eval coverage for the GC-D2 flow, including allowing guarded relation `continue` and adding the current-editor-after-detour live eval case.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active topic appears closed: the user asked for the change and the assistant reported it fixed and green. Earlier turns are solved status updates and implementation chatter, so they are good raw-eviction candidates. The only useful carry-forward is compact semantic memory of the regression check command and the fact that the fix plus live eval coverage landed.
